about.title: About RentMyBike
about.body1: RentMyBike is a peer-to-peer bike rental marketplace built as a student project. It connects bike owners — individuals and small rental businesses — with people who want to rent a bike for a day, a week, or longer.
about.body2: The goal is to make short-term bike rental simple and affordable, without going through a traditional rental shop: owners set their own prices and availability, and renters book directly with them.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body1: This project is currently maintained by a single developer as a student project.
contact.body2: For questions, bug reports, or feedback, feel free to reach out by email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This is a student project. The notes below describe how data is currently handled — this is not a substitute for formal legal advice.
privacy.section1Body: Account information you provide (name, email, phone), bike listings, booking details, messages exchanged through the in-app chat, and photos uploaded for rentals.
privacy.section2Body: Solely to operate the marketplace: creating bookings, showing listings, enabling communication between renters and owners, and account management.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is not sold or shared with third parties for advertising. Information visible to other users (like your name and reviews) is limited to what's needed to complete a rental.
privacy.section4Body: If you have questions about your data, reach out via the Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms are provided as a baseline for this student project and may not cover every legal scenario.
terms.section1Body: RentMyBike is a platform that connects bike owners and renters. RentMyBike is not the owner of the bikes listed and is not a party to the rental agreement between users.
terms.section2Body: Owners are responsible for the accuracy of their listings and the condition of their bikes. Renters are responsible for returning bikes in the condition received and for any damage caused during the rental period.
terms.section3Body: A booking request is not confirmed until the owner accepts it. Either party can use the in-app chat to coordinate pickup, return, and any issues.
terms.section4Body: These terms may be updated as the project evolves.

hero.title: Rent a Bike, Explore Your City
hero.subtitle: The peer-to-peer marketplace to rent bikes from locals. Affordable, flexible, eco-friendly.

features.title: Why RentMyBike?
features.peerDesc: Rent directly from local owners. No middleman, fair prices.
features.flexibleDesc: Book for a day, a week, or longer. Cancel anytime before acceptance.
features.trustedDesc: Verified reviews from real renters and owners.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search by city and dates to see what's available near you.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick your dates and send a booking request to the owner.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Once accepted, meet the owner, get the bike, and go explore.

safety.title: Safe and transparent rentals
safety.subtitle: Every booking is backed by features built to protect both sides.
safety.photosDesc: Owners and renters can document the bike's condition at handover and return.
safety.reviewsDesc: Renters and owners rate each other after every completed booking.
safety.directDesc: Chat with the owner or renter directly about pickup details and questions.

audience.owner1: Earn money from a bike you're not using every day
audience.owner2: Set your own price per day
audience.owner3: Choose your own availability and dates
audience.renter1: Often cheaper than traditional rental shops
audience.renter2: Wide selection of bike types across cities
audience.renter3: Rent directly from real local owners

business.title: Have a bike rental business?
business.subtitle: RentMyBike has a dedicated toolkit for businesses managing multiple bikes.
business.item1: Business dashboard with revenue and booking stats
business.item2: Booking calendar across all your bikes
business.item4: Rent out accessories like helmets, child seats, and locks
